bead.title: Stage 2.12: Subscription resolvers — executionEvidence + coordinatorMetrics
bead.description: Implement subscription resolvers for executionEvidence(runID) and coordinatorMetrics(projectRoot). New file cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_sub_exec.go. Wire to land-coordinator event hook and execution run event stream. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 2 bead #25.
bead.acceptance: (1) Integration tests pass. (2) MANUAL for each: subscribe in GraphiQL, trigger the underlying event (execute a bead / run execute-loop), see events arrive. Record in completion note.
